steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: From the given relationship $3\text{ teaspoons} = 1\text{ tablespoon}$, to convert tablespoons to teaspoons, we multiply by 3.

steps.title: Perform the calculation
steps.content: Multiply: $$44 \times 3 = 132\text{ teaspoons}$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
